title: sarothra japonica
intro: Sarothra japonica, also known as the Japanese Sarothra or Japanese Tree Peony, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. It has been traditionally used in various forms of medicine, particularly in East Asian cultures, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sarothra japonica include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia. Traditionally, Sarothra japonica has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
